member.name: T:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownPresentationStyle
member.summary: This defines a presentation style used to generate markdown content (GitHub flavored)

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownPresentationStyle.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownPresentationStyle.ResourceItemFiles(System.String)
member.remarks: This presentation style uses the standard shared content and overrides a few items with Markdown specific values.

member.name: T:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation
member.summary: This class is used to generate a MAML or API markdown topic from the raw topic XML data for the Markdown presentation style.

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.#ctor(System.Func{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Constructor
member.param: The function used to resolve content file paths for the presentation style

member.name: P:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.MaxVersionParts
member.summary: Maximum version parts

member.name: P:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.IncludeEnumValues
member.summary: Include enumerated type values

member.name: P:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.EnumMemberSortOrder
member.summary: Enumeration member sort order

member.name: P:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.FlagsEnumValueFormat
member.summary: Flags enumeration value format

member.name: P:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.FlagsEnumSeparatorSize
member.summary: Flags enumeration value separator group size

member.name: P:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.IncludeIntegerEnumSeparators
member.summary: Include separators for integer enumeration values

member.name: P:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.BaseSourceCodeUrl
member.summary: Base source code URL

member.name: P:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.ShowParametersOnAllMethods
member.summary: Show parameters on all methods on the member list page, not just on overloads

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.CreateLanguageSpecificText
member.remarks: This presentation style does not use language specific text

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderTextNode(System.Xml.Linq.XElement,System.Xml.Linq.XText)
member.summary: This is used to provide additional whitespace handling and normalization for markdown elements
member.param: The content element to which the text is added

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.CreateSection(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.remarks: The returned content element is always null and the content should be inserted into the transformation's current element after adding the title element.

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.CreateSubsection(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.remarks: The returned content element is always null and the content should be inserted into the transformation's current element after adding the title element.

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderNotices(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: This is used to render the preliminary, obsolete, and experimental API notices

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiSummarySection(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: This is used to render the summary section

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiInheritanceHierarchy(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore,System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Render the inheritance hierarchy section
member.param: The content element to which the information is added

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiNamespaceAndAssemblyInformation(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore,System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: This is used to render namespace and assembly information for an API topic
member.param: The content element to which the information is added

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiSyntaxSection(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: This is used to render the syntax section

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiMemberList(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: This is used to render a member list topic (root, root group, namespace group, namespace, enumeration, type, or type member list).

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiRootList(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: Render the list in a root group or root topic

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiNamespaceGroupList(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: Render the list in a namespace group topic

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiNamespaceList(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: Render the category lists in a namespace topic

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiEnumerationMembersList(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: Render the members of an enumeration

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiTypeMemberLists(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: Render type member lists
member.remarks: This is used for types and the member list subtopics

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiSectionTable(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Xml.Linq.XElement})
member.summary: Render a section with a title and a table containing the element content
member.param: An enumerable list of the elements to render in the table

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiRemarksSection(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: This is used to render the remarks section

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiExamplesSection(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: This is used to render the examples section

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiVersionsSection(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: This is used to render the versions section

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiRevisionHistorySection(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: Render the revision history section if applicable

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiBibliographySection(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: Render the bibliography section if applicable

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiSeeAlsoSection(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore)
member.summary: This renders the See Also section if applicable

member.name: M:Sandcastle.PresentationStyles.Markdown.MarkdownTransformation.RenderApiAutoGeneratedSeeAlsoLinks(Sandcastle.Core.PresentationStyle.Transformation.TopicTransformationCore,System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Render auto-generated see also section links based on the API topic
member.param: The subsection to which the links are added
